title: fix: default audio to true for video generation
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Videos get their voice
gist.blurb: We flipped the switch so video generation now includes audio by default for supported models. Time to let your moving pixels make some noise!
gist.summary: Updated the video generation API to default the audio parameter to true.
gist.impact: Videos generated with supported models like Wan will now automatically include sound, saving you an extra parameter flag.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing tiny headphones, watching a retro TV or monitor that is playing a video with musical notes coming out of it to represent the new default audio feature.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny retro headphones, watching a chunky CRT television that has colorful pixelated musical notes floating out of its speakers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
